历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 5532 → 5098 → 4213 → 4966 → 5756, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; the 2025 baseline is about 5756, which is about 790 places lower than 2024, with significant fluctuations in the past two years; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu science (physics category): 2021: 36 students → 2022: 33 students → 2023: 30 students → 2024: 27 students → 2025: 23 students, showing a decreasing trend year by year; in 2026, the plan significantly increases to 42 students, an expansion of about 83% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will notably lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; Shandong University (Weihai) is the Weihai campus of Shandong University. Shandong University ranks about 22nd on the 2026 Soft Science main list, belonging to the top-tier domestic university level, which strongly attracts candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to the ongoing impact of the 2019 study partner incident; Douyin popularity does not enter the top 106 overall, with average attention; no obvious record of admission gaps; relying on Shandong University's discipline system, with Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., and strong disciplinary strengths in mathematics, computer science, electronic information, and other directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, etc., are recommended as hot/very hot majors for 2026, highly aligned with this university's enrollment majors; the total number of candidates in Gansu Province for 2026 is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 179,817), with physics category candidates estimated at about 147,600 based on historical proportions, intensifying competition; the university is located in Weihai, Shandong, which is a cross-province application for Gansu candidates, with no obvious regional preference advantage; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5756, the significant expansion of about 83% in the 2026 plan (from 23 to 42 students) will notably lower the admission threshold, the increase of about 21.6% in the total number of Gansu candidates intensifies competition, and the somewhat negative university reputation; considering that the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, the actual competition intensity is slightly lower than the pure expansion expectation. After a slight adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 8559, with a range of 8059–9059.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the physics category of this university significantly expands enrollment to 42 students, with a predicted ranking range of 8059–9059, notably lower than the 2025 baseline. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and aim for Tier 1 as a stretch; candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<8059) can focus on aiming for the top majors in electronic information and mathematics; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (>9059) should apply cautiously and consider other universities as safety options.
